columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: The number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm (SOC + AAP) with high-risk metastatic disease is reported in Table 1, under the "Metastatic disease risk group" section. Extract the value from the row "High-risk" and column "SOC + AAP | n = 501".
columns.column_name_raw: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Treatment

columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Control
columns.extraction_plan: The number and percentage of participants in the control arm (SOC-alone) with high-risk metastatic disease is reported in Table 1, under the "Metastatic disease risk group" section. Extract the value from the row "High-risk" and column "SOC-alone | n = 502".
columns.column_name_raw: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Control

columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | Low | Control
columns.extraction_plan: The number and percentage of participants in the control arm (SOC-alone) with low-risk metastatic disease is reported in Table 1, under the "Metastatic disease risk group" section. Extract the value from the row "Low-risk" and column "SOC-alone | n = 502".
columns.column_name_raw: Volume of disease - N (%) | Low | Control
